description: 收件箱来源与类别动态化 - 将固定枚举改为可动态创建的数据库实体，支持自动创建、获取、删除功能

userStories.title: Create inbox_source and inbox_category database tables
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need database tables to store user-defined source and category values.
acceptanceCriteria: Create inbox_source table: id(PK), uid, name, created_at, updated_at
Create inbox_category table: id(PK), uid, name, created_at, updated_at
Add unique index on (uid, name) for each table
Export schemas from apps/server/src/db/schema/index.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Created inbox_source and inbox_category schemas with proper indexes and exports

userStories.title: Generate migration for source and category tables
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I need migration artifacts so the new tables can be applied safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server build before migration
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/server migrate:generate
Migration creates inbox_source and inbox_category tables with proper indexes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Generated migration 0007_sad_micromacro.sql with proper table and index definitions

userStories.title: Create source and category DTOs
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I need DTO contracts for source and category API operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add source DTOs: SourceDto, CreateSourceDto, SourceListResponse
Add category DTOs: CategoryDto, CreateCategoryDto, CategoryListResponse
Export from packages/dto/src/index.ts
Run pnpm --filter @echoe/dto build
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Created inbox-source-category.dto.ts with all required DTOs

userStories.title: Implement source and category service with seed data
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need service logic to manage sources and categories with default seed data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement InboxSourceService with CRUD operations
Implement InboxCategoryService with CRUD operations
Add seedDefaultData method to create default sources (manual, web, api, extension, other) and categories (backend, frontend, design, product, life, other) on first access
Ensure uid scoping for all operations
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Implemented InboxSourceService and InboxCategoryService with full CRUD, auto-seeding, and comprehensive tests

userStories.title: Add source and category endpoints for list and create
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need API endpoints to list and create sources and categories.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/inbox/sources - list all sources for current user
GET /api/v1/inbox/categories - list all categories for current user
POST /api/v1/inbox/sources - create new source
POST /api/v1/inbox/categories - create new category
Validate name uniqueness per tenant
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Implemented InboxSourceController and InboxCategoryController with GET and POST endpoints, comprehensive tests, and proper validation

userStories.title: Add source and category delete endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to delete unused sources and categories.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/v1/inbox/sources/:id - delete source and clear related inbox records
DELETE /api/v1/inbox/categories/:id - delete category and clear related inbox records
When deleted, set inbox.source or inbox.category to null (not delete inbox)
Ensure uid scoping for all operations
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Implemented DELETE endpoints for source and category with proper inbox record cleanup

userStories.title: Update inbox schema to support dynamic source/category
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need the inbox table to accept dynamic source/category values.
acceptanceCriteria: Change inbox.source field type to varchar(191) nullable
Change inbox.category field type to varchar(191) nullable
Generate migration for field type change
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Updated inbox schema and generated migration 0008_majestic_mimic.sql

userStories.title: Update inbox DTOs to support dynamic source/category
userStories.description: As a shared package maintainer, I need DTOs that accept string source/category values.
acceptanceCriteria: Update CreateInboxDto: source and category become optional string type
Update UpdateInboxDto: source and category become optional string type
Update InboxQueryParams: source and category become optional string type
Build dto package
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Updated all inbox DTOs to use string types for source/category, updated frontend components and services to match

userStories.title: Update inbox service to auto-create source/category on inbox creation
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system to automatically create source/category when creating inbox with new values.
acceptanceCriteria: When creating inbox, if source string doesn't exist in inbox_source, create it automatically
When creating inbox, if category string doesn't exist in inbox_category, create it automatically
Maintain backward compatibility with existing enum values
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Updated InboxService to inject InboxSourceService and InboxCategoryService, added auto-creation logic in create() method, added comprehensive tests

userStories.title: Update inbox service to support dynamic source/category on update
userStories.description: As a user, I want to update inbox with new source/category values that get auto-created.
acceptanceCriteria: When updating inbox source/category, auto-create if value doesn't exist
Support setting source/category to null
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Updated InboxService.update() method to auto-create source/category when provided (non-null values), supports setting to null, added 4 comprehensive tests

userStories.title: Update inbox list endpoint to filter by source/category name
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter inbox list by source or category name.
acceptanceCriteria: List endpoint supports filtering by source name (string)
List endpoint supports filtering by category name (string)
Support filtering where source/category is null
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Updated InboxService.list() and InboxController to support source/category filtering with null support, added 4 new tests

userStories.title: Add frontend API clients for source and category
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need typed API functions to consume source/category endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getInboxSources() API function
Add getInboxCategories() API function
Add createInboxSource() API function
Add createInboxCategory() API function
Add deleteInboxSource() API function
Add deleteInboxCategory() API function
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Created inbox-source-category.ts API client with all 6 required functions

userStories.title: Add source/category dropdown filters to inbox list page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter inbox list by source or category using dropdown menus.
acceptanceCriteria: Add source dropdown filter to inbox list page
Add category dropdown filter to inbox list page
Dropdown options loaded from API
Filter state persisted in URL params
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: Added source and category dropdown filters with dynamic options from API, URL param persistence

userStories.title: Update inbox create/edit form with source/category dropdown and quick create
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select source/category from dropdown or enter new value to create on-the-fly.
acceptanceCriteria: Source field becomes dropdown with options from API
Category field becomes dropdown with options from API
Support typing new value and pressing Enter or clicking add button to create
Newly created option is automatically selected
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create source/category management page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a settings page to view, create, and delete my sources and categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /settings/inbox-categories page
Display list of all sources with inbox count
Display list of all categories with inbox count
Allow creating new source/category via form
Allow deleting source/category with confirmation dialog
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
